title: ambulia indica
intro: Ambulia indica, also known as Ocimum tenuiflorum, is a tropical plant species belonging to the mint family, commonly found in the Indian subcontinent. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Ambulia indica include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and help manage stress and anxiety. The plant is often prepared as a herbal tea or oil, which is then used to treat a range of ailments, and its leaves can also be consumed fresh in salads or as a garnish.
